sessions.details: one and only session. Recorded: 1981-08-21. No known commercial release.

sessions.artist: Faces: Recorded 1971-04-20 for Sounds Of The Seventies

track_listing.track: Friday Night Connection (not recorded in file b)
a) Only the Faces session tracks, taken from the Gumtree Tapes (). 256kbps
c) Download from Mega, MediaFire or Google

transcript.text: It's the Friday Rock Show.
Good evening on this Friday. It's Richard Skinner for Tommy Vance who's on holiday for a week or so.
Tonight we're featuring a vintage session from the early 70s from The Faces.
Also up to date from Birmingham, a brand new band called Starfighters.
And first some music on disc from Meat Loaf's new album Dead Ringer.
John, if you're listening, this isn't for you. It's called Peel Out. Here it comes.
Steve Hackett and that's the title track from his 1979 album Spectral Mornings.
Actually, we did play that one for Ian Lyddiard, who's also asked us to say hello today to his fiancée, Julie Clark, of No. 3 Belmont Drive, Fayland, this evening.
Well, the reason is because Julie's just back from three weeks in France.
Julie, Ian says that he loves you very much, and he's looking forward to the 14th, as he says it.
All right.
Also, Ian would like to say hi to Tim and Eamon, if they're listening tonight.
So, hello, Tim.
Hello, Eamon.
Before that, you heard Peel Out from the long-awaited new LP from Meatloaf.
that LP I think is well worth waiting for too
some remarkable music on it
